untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires identifying two distinct peaks at equal heights with intervening valley - this is a visual/structural pattern recognition task that cannot be expressed using point-in-time technical indicators. The entry conditions describe pattern morphology (tall vs short, wide vs narrow, peak variation measurements) that require multi-bar pattern analysis not available in the allowed indicator set. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no explicit rules provided.
translation_notes: Signal describes a classical chart pattern (Double Tops) that requires identifying specific price structure across multiple bars. While the performance metrics (success rates and average declines by pattern type and market regime) are quantifiable, the actual pattern detection logic cannot be coded with the available indicators. A practical implementation would require a dedicated pattern recognition module or custom logic to detect the two-peak formation before these conditional rules could apply.
